# OpenAgentsControl .opencode scaffold

This directory was reconstructed to satisfy local `.opencode` symlink targets.

The original vendor payload appears incomplete in this sandbox (`vendor-OpenAgentsControl.tar` only contains an empty top-level directory).

Expected subdirectories are present:

- `agent`
- `config`
- `context`
- `plugin`
- `skills`
- `tool`

Populate these with upstream OpenAgentsControl assets when available.
